title: The proclamation in Mecca of the 'Alid Muhammad b. Ja'far al-Sadiq as Caliph
description: The proclamation in Mecca of the 'Alid Muhammad b. Ja'far al-Sadiq as Caliph. Recorded under the year 198 AH (814–815 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
